summary: Iteration 84 - Tested all new features: Supplier Returns (cash_refund, credit_return, full_invoice_return), Expense Refunds, Employee Status Filter (Active/Left/All), Scheduled PDF Reports CRUD, and Bill Image Upload. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test data created: supplier returns, expense refunds, scheduled reports - all cleaned up by test suite
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 84 fully tested and working. Supplier Returns with 3 types (cash_refund, credit_return, full_invoice_return) working. Expense Refunds creating negative expense entries. Employee status filter cards (Active/Left/All) clickable and filtering correctly. Scheduled Reports page with full CRUD operations. Bill image upload for supplier payments working.

endpoints.POST /api/supplier-returns: Creates return with types: cash_refund, credit_return, full_invoice_return
endpoints.GET /api/supplier-returns: Lists all returns with filtering by supplier_id
endpoints.DELETE /api/supplier-returns/{id}: Deletes return and reverses balance changes

ui_elements.return_button: Visible in Supplier Payments page header
ui_elements.return_form: Opens with supplier selection, return type dropdown, amount, reason, invoice ref, date, bill upload
ui_elements.returns_table: Shows recorded returns with type badges (credit_return shown in red), delete button

bill_image_upload.ui: Upload button in payment form and return form, View Bill link in transactions table

endpoints.POST /api/expense-refunds: Creates refund with negative expense entry

ui_elements.refund_button: Red 'Refund' button in Expenses page header
ui_elements.refund_dialog: Opens with amount, reason, refund mode (cash/bank/credit), date fields
ui_elements.submit_button: Record Refund button to create refund

filter_cards.active: Shows active employees count in emerald, clickable to filter
filter_cards.left_terminated: Shows left/terminated count in red, clickable to filter
filter_cards.show_all: Shows all count in blue, clickable to show all

filtering_logic.active: Shows employees without status or status='active'

endpoints.POST /api/pdf-exports/scheduled-reports/: Manual trigger (MOCKED - doesn't actually send email)

schedule_form.report_type_select: Sales Summary, Expenses Summary, Profit & Loss, Supplier Aging
schedule_form.time_picker: Time of day for scheduled send

test_classes: TestSupplierReturns (6 tests): CRUD operations for supplier returns
TestBillImageUpload (1 test): Bill image upload functionality
TestExpenseRefunds (2 tests): Create and list expense refunds
TestScheduledReports (5 tests): Full CRUD + send-now for scheduled reports
TestCleanup (2 tests): Clean up test data

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/pdf-exports/scheduled-reports/{id}/send-now - records send but doesn't actually email (SMTP not configured)
